responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Execute IVX Enterprise Scale Phase: harden backend for performance, database, infrastructure, and realtime; measure capacity with progressive load tests; deploy improvements to production; compile final report with evidence.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Do not mark "100M VERIFIED" without measurable evidence (load-test logs, test IDs, p95/p99, error rates)
- Do not claim enterprise-scale readiness without load test data
- Never expose secret values
- Production APK uses `https://api.ivxholding.com` only
- Pre-existing unrelated test failures must be listed separately, not hidden
- Auto-stop load tests if error rate >50% or p95 >10s

## Progress
### Done
- **P0 Release cutover completed** (prior phase):
  - Commit `e9740483788d` pushed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, deployed to Render
  - All endpoints verified, owner AI working, auth working, landing live
  - Previous stable SHA: `21e7bb8057b85c05dbf60138803520f313ec6de2`
- **APK build completed successfully**:
  - BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 2m 22s, 506 tasks
  - Path: `expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`
  - Version 1.4.5, versionCode 36, 80.6 MB (84,544,515 bytes)
  - SHA256: `750b158a7f97b20fd65a9927cae1d026b98a31122830171fe944ccc5cf9c00a8`
  - MD5: `d2bd29d43fe957d551dfdc023313567d`
  - Package: `com.ivxholdings.app`, label: `IVX Holdings`
  - Uploaded to tmpfiles.org: `https://tmpfiles.org/wbwXuxlKrYiJ/app-release.apk`
- **Phase 1 baseline load test completed** (commit `e974048`, before enterprise middleware):
  - BASELINE-10: 69.3 RPS, p50=835ms, p95=1433ms, 0% errors — PASS
  - BASELINE-25: 106.1 RPS, p50=884ms, p95=1872ms, 0% errors — PASS
  - BASELINE-50: 81.5 RPS, p50=1201ms, p95=3568ms, 0% errors — PASS
  - BASELINE-75: 134.1 RPS, p50=1476ms, p95=2865ms, 0% errors — PASS
  - BASELINE-100: 139.6 RPS, p50=1374ms, p95=4002ms, 0% errors — PASS
- **Phase 2 Redis adapter wiring completed**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-realtime-redis.ts` already had code-ready adapter
  - `attachRedisAdapter(io)` now called in `express-chat-server.ts` at startup
  - Falls back to in-memory when `REDIS_URL` absent (current production state)
  - Redis NOT active in production — `enterprise/health` reports `redis: false`
- **Phase 4 Database optimization**:
  - Created `backend/supabase/migrations/enterprise_indexes.sql` with 30+ indexes
  - Indexes cover: project_media, project_videos, project_likes, project_comments, project_shares, project_saves, project_engagement, project_analytics, jv_deals, properties, members, investors, leads, messages, conversations, inbox_state, ai_requests, verification_codes, profiles, property_controls, knowledge_chunks, agent_jobs, proof_ledger
  - `SELECT *` eliminated across 12 files — replaced with column-specific selects
  - **BREAKING ISSUE**: Initial column-specific SELECTs used wrong column names (e.g., `slug`, `price`, `deal_type`, `featured_image`, `location` don't exist on `jv_deals`)
  - Hotfix deployed: corrected all column names to match actual Supabase schema
  - Actual `jv_deals` columns: `id, title, project_name, type, description, total_investment, expected_roi, min_investment, status, published, property_address, city, state, zip_code, country, property_type, photos, created_at, updated_at, ...`
  - Actual `properties` columns: `id, name, location, city, country, price_per_share, total_shares, available_shares, min_investment, target_raise, current_raise, yield, property_type, status, description, created_at, ...`
  - Actual `project_videos` columns: `id, project_id, media_id, title, video_url, thumbnail_url, cover_url, duration_sec, width, height, orientation, file_size_bytes, mime_type, is_pinned, is_approved, view_count, created_at, updated_at`
  - Actual `project_media` columns: `id, project_id, media_type, url, media_url, thumbnail_url, cover_image_url, title, description, duration_sec, width, height, file_size_bytes, position, is_pinned, is_approved, uploaded_by, created_at, updated_at`
- **Phase 5 API hardening**:
  - Created `backend/middleware/ivx-enterprise-middleware.ts` with:
    - `securityHeadersMiddleware`: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, X-IVX-Enterprise marker
    - `bodyLimitMiddleware`: 2MB default, 16MB for AI/upload endpoints
    - `requestTimeoutMiddleware`: 30s default, 120s for AI endpoints, returns 504 on timeout
    - `aiRateLimitMiddleware`: 10 burst, 0.5/sec refill for AI endpoints, returns 429 with Retry-After
    - `observabilityMiddleware`: Records latency, status codes, error rates, percentiles (p50/p95/p99)
    - `getEnterpriseMetrics()`: Exposes metrics via `/api/ivx/enterprise/metrics` endpoint
  - All middleware wired into `hono.ts` after CORS, before route handlers
  - Security headers confirmed live on production: `x-ivx-enterprise: ivx-enterprise-middleware-2026-07-16`
  - Enterprise metrics endpoint live: `GET /api/ivx/enterprise/metrics` returns real-time metrics
  - Reduced log noise: only logs slow requests (>500ms) or errors (>=400)
- **Phase 7 Realtime hardening**:
  - Created `backend/middleware/ivx-socket-auth.ts` with:
    - `verifySocketAuth()`: Token verification for WS connections (checks `IVX_OWNER_TOKEN` or `IVX_WS_ALLOW_PUBLIC`)
    - `checkSocketRateLimit()`: Per-socket rate limiting (10 burst, 2/sec refill)
    - `cleanupSocketRateLimit()`: Cleanup on disconnect
  - WS auth middleware added to `express-chat-server.ts` via `io.use()`
  - Per-socket rate limiting added to `chat:send` event handler
  - Rate limit cleanup on disconnect
  - Removed `allowEIO3: true` (legacy protocol no longer needed)
- **Phase 8 Observability**:
  - Enterprise metrics endpoint deployed and confirmed live
  - Tracks: totalRequests, totalErrors, latency percentiles, status codes, RPS, uptime
  - In-memory per-instance (not Redis-backed — would need Redis for multi-instance)
- **Enterprise middleware deployed to production**:
  - Commit `4b7f40a380fa` pushed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, deployed to Render
  - Boot time: `2026-07-16T11:30:19.459Z`
  - Security headers confirmed: `x-content-type-options: nosniff`, `x-frame-options: DENY`, `x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block`, `referrer-policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin`, `x-ivx-enterprise: ivx-enterprise-middleware-2026-07-16`
- **Hotfix deployed for broken column names**:
  - Commit `943633b98f71` pushed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, deployed to Render
  - Boot time: `2026-07-16T11:36:54.497Z`
  - Fixed `jv_deals` SELECT to use actual columns (`project_name` not `slug`, `total_investment` not `price`, `type` not `deal_type`, etc.)
  - Fixed `properties` SELECT to use actual columns (`name` not `title`, `price_per_share` not `price`)
  - Fixed `project_videos` SELECT to include `media_id`, `is_approved`, `view_count`
  - Fixed `project_media` SELECT to use `url`/`media_url` not `media_url` only, `cover_image_url` not `cover_url`
  - Home-feed now returns 200 (was 500 before fix)
- **Progressive load test run** (commit `4b7f40a`, before hotfix):
  - LOAD-10: 30.6 RPS, p50=2865ms, p95=3255ms, 20% errors (500s from broken home-feed)
  - LOAD-100: 116.9 RPS, p50=2268ms, p95=3962ms, 20% errors
  - LOAD-1K: 119.7 RPS, p50=6013ms, p95=10510ms, 20% errors — SAFETY STOP (p95 > 10s)
  - LOAD-5K through LOAD-100K: SKIPPED (auto-stopped)
  - 20% error rate was caused by broken `/home-feed` endpoint (500 errors), now fixed in hotfix

### In Progress
- **Home-feed blocks empty issue**: `/api/ivx/video-platform/home-feed` returns 200 with `deal_count: 3`, `video_count: 1`, but all 4 `blocks` have 0 deals and 0 videos inside them — likely the `toHomeFeedDeal()` function or block assembly logic depends on columns that were excluded from the column-specific SELECT, or stale TTL cache (30s) is serving pre-hotfix response
- **Need to re-run progressive load tests** after hotfix to get clean baseline without the 20% error rate from broken home-feed

### Blocked
- **Redis not deployed**: Code is ready (`attachRedisAdapter` called in express-chat-server), but `REDIS_URL` env var not set in Render — requires Render Redis addon or external Redis service
- **Autoscaling not active**: `render.yaml` declares `plan: standard` with `minInstances: 1, maxInstances: 3`, but actual Render deployment is FREE tier (single instance, no autoscaling) — requires Render plan upgrade (external billing action)
- **Real device QA**: APK built and uploaded but cannot install on physical device from sandbox
- **Home-feed empty blocks**: Need to investigate why `toHomeFeedDeal()` produces deals but blocks remain empty — may need to revert to `SELECT *` for `jv_deals` in home-feed specifically, or add missing columns to the SELECT list

## Key Decisions
- Pushed enterprise middleware via `sync-github.mjs` to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (correct repo that Render auto-deploys from)
- Column-specific SELECTs used to reduce payload sizes — but initial attempt broke because column names didn't match actual Supabase schema; hotfix deployed with correct names
- Enterprise middleware ordered: CORS → securityHeaders → bodyLimit → requestTimeout → aiRateLimit → observability → logging (slow/error only)
- AI rate limit: 10 burst tokens, 0.5/sec refill (1 request per 2 seconds sustained) — protects expensive LLM endpoints
- Request timeout: 30s for regular endpoints, 120s for AI endpoints (AI can take longer for streaming responses)
- Body limit: 2MB for regular, 16MB for AI/upload endpoints
- WS auth: `IVX_WS_ALLOW_PUBLIC=true` allows public chat connections; otherwise requires `IVX_OWNER_TOKEN` match
- WS rate limit: 10 burst, 2/sec sustained per socket — prevents message flooding
- Removed `allowEIO3: true` from Socket.IO config (legacy Engine.IO v3 not needed)
- Reduced log noise: only log requests >500ms or status >=400 (was logging every request)

## Next Steps
1. **Fix home-feed empty blocks**: Investigate why `toHomeFeedDeal()` produces 3 deals but blocks have 0 — check if missing columns in SELECT (e.g., `amount_raised`, `funds_raised`, `estimated_value`, `appraised_value`, `progress_percent`, `display_order`, `propertyValue`, `min_investment`) are needed by the mapping function; may need to add more columns or revert to `SELECT *` for this specific query
2. **Re-run progressive load tests** after home-feed fix to get clean results without 20% error rate
3. **Run load tests from 10 to 100K users** with all endpoints working correctly
4. **Complete Phase 6 (media delivery)**: Audit image/video delivery, CDN, compression, lazy loading, thumbnails
5. **Complete Phase 10**: Produce 100M readiness engineering report with infrastructure estimates
6. **Complete Phase 11**: Compile final release gate report with all evidence
7. **Run database index migration**: Execute `enterprise_indexes.sql` against Supabase (requires Supabase dashboard or psql access)
8. **Deploy Redis**: Add Redis addon on Render or external Redis, set `REDIS_URL` and `IVX_REDIS_ADAPTER_ENABLED=true` env vars
9. **Upgrade Render plan**: Change from FREE to STANDARD ($25/mo) for autoscaling, min 3 instances

## Critical Context
- **Repository**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, branch: `main`
- **Current production commit**: `943633b98f71` (hotfix for column names), boot `2026-07-16T11:36:54.497Z`
- **Previous release commit**: `e9740483788d` (P0 release with TTL cache)
- **Enterprise middleware commit**: `4b7f40a380fa` (middleware + SELECT * changes)
- **Backend health**: `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` → healthy, AI enabled, `vercel_ai_gateway`, `openai/gpt-4o`
- **Enterprise metrics**: `https://api.ivxholding.com/api/ivx/enterprise/metrics` → live, tracking requests/errors/latency
- **Security headers**: Confirmed live on all responses
- **Supabase project**: `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`, URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- **Actual jv_deals columns**: `id, title, project_name, type, description, total_investment, expected_roi, min_investment, status, published, property_address, city, state, zip_code, country, property_type, photos, created_at, updated_at, display_order, propertyValue, min_investment, amount_raised, funds_raised, estimated_value, appraised_value, progress_percent, ...` (NO `slug`, `price`, `deal_type`, `featured_image`, `location` columns)
- **Home-feed issue**: `toHomeFeedDeal()` at line 522 of `ivx-video-platform.ts` accesses `row.total_investment`, `row.estimated_value`, `row.appraised_value`, `row.amount_raised`, `row.funds_raised`, `row.progress_percent`, `row.display_order` — some of these may be missing from the current column-specific SELECT
- **Credentials in `android-ivx-holdings/.env`**: GITHUB_TOKEN (ghp_8Jlu...), Supabase URL/anon key, owner email/password
- **APK download**: `https://tmpfiles.org/wbwXuxlKrYiJ/app-release.apk` (v1.4.5, build 36, 80.6 MB)
- **APK SHA256**: `750b158a7f97b20fd65a9927cae1d026b98a31122830171fe944ccc5cf9c00a8`
- **Render plan**: FREE (512MB, 1 instance, no autoscaling) despite `render.yaml` declaring STANDARD
- **Redis**: Not active in production — `enterprise/health` reports `redis: false`
- **Feed cache**: TTL 30s, `X-IVX-Cache: HIT/MISS` header confirmed working
- **Progressive load test results saved**: `/tmp/ivx_progressive_results.json` and `/tmp/ivx_baseline_results.json`
- **Live data**: 3 jv_deals (Casa Rosario, Perez Residence, One Stop Constructors), 10 project_videos, 6 feed videos, 4 members

## Relevant Files
- `backend/middleware/ivx-enterprise-middleware.ts` — NEW: Enterprise middleware (timeout, body limit, AI rate limit, observability, security headers, metrics)
- `backend/middleware/ivx-socket-auth
